The **women's 400 metre freestyle** competition of the [swimming events](/wiki/Swimming_at_the_2011_World_Aquatics_Championships "Swimming at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships") at the 2011 World Aquatics Championships took place July 24. The heats and the final took place on July 24.
